briefdescription.para: Output the Position to an ostream.

memberdef.name: x_

briefdescription.para: Default constructor, initializing all coordinates to zero.
Constructor initializing a Position from an array.
Constructor initializing a Position from a std::vector.

memberdef.name: operator=

simplesect.para: an element (coordinate) of the Position
an element (coordinate) of the Position

briefdescription.para: Moves Position variables into an array.

simplesect.para: array of positions stored as a token object.

memberdef.name: get_vector

simplesect.para: elementwise sum of coordinates.
elementwise difference of coordinates.

memberdef.definition: Position< D, T > nest::Position< D, T >::operator-
memberdef.name: operator-

simplesect.para: opposite vector.
elementwise product of coordinates.
elementwise quotient of coordinates.

memberdef.definition: Position< D, T > nest::Position< D, T >::operator+
memberdef.name: operator+

simplesect.para: position vector with scalar added to all coordinates

memberdef.definition: Position< D, T > nest::Position< D, T >::operator-
memberdef.name: operator-

simplesect.para: position vector with scalar subtracted from all coordinates

memberdef.definition: Position< D, T > nest::Position< D, T >::operator*
memberdef.name: operator*

simplesect.para: position vector multiplied with the scalar.

memberdef.definition: Position< D, T > nest::Position< D, T >::operator/
memberdef.name: operator/

simplesect.para: position vector divided by the scalar.
the Position itself after adding the other Position elementwise.
the Position itself after subtracting the other Position elementwise.
the Position itself after multiplying with the other Position elementwise.
the Position itself after dividing by the other Position elementwise.

memberdef.definition: Position< D, T > & nest::Position< D, T >::operator+=
memberdef.name: operator+=

simplesect.para: the Position itself after adding the scalar to all coordinates.

memberdef.definition: Position< D, T > & nest::Position< D, T >::operator-=
memberdef.name: operator-=

simplesect.para: the Position itself after subtracting the scalar from all coordinates.

memberdef.definition: Position< D, T > & nest::Position< D, T >::operator*=
memberdef.name: operator*=

simplesect.para: the Position itself after multiplying with the scalar.

memberdef.definition: Position< D, T > & nest::Position< D, T >::operator/=
memberdef.name: operator/=

simplesect.para: the Position itself after dividing by the scalar.
true if all coordinates are equal
true if not all coordinates are equal
true if all coordinates are less
true if all coordinates are greater
true if all coordinates are less or equal
true if all coordinates are greater or equal
Euclidian norm of the vector.
string representation of Position

detaileddescription.para: Format: Only as many coordinates as dimensions, separated by spaces [default], no trailing space.
